title: You are loved.
excerpt: Every now and again it's fun to be matchy matchy. I realized that these BZees shoes matched my outfit perfectly. The Sashay slip ons are nice and lightweight. For me, comfort is key - and these shoes are perfect for…
body: Every now and again it's fun to be matchy matchy. I realized that these BZees shoes matched my outfit perfectly. The Sashay slip ons are nice and lightweight. For me, comfort is key - and these shoes are perfect for adding a little spring in your step. And since it's always nice to be reminded that you are loved, I scribbled this message in hopes others would find it and smile too. Side note - Anyone know the laws/rules about doing this? I kind of want to spread more of these around town for people to find.
